name: mastra_meta_state_resolve
schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Exact entry id to resolve"},"resolution":{"description":"How it was resolved","type":"string"},"resolved_by":{"default":"operator","description":"Who resolved it","type":"string","enum":["operator","auto-resolve"]},"cascade_from":{"description":"Optional list of finding ids whose `reopens` field must include this entry's id. When provided, each child must exist, have `reopens` containing this entry's id, and be in `active` or `resolved` status. The parent is closed in 1 call. Only `stale` and `active` parents are cascade-closeable; `reported` parents return `cascade_parent_is_reported` and must be acked first via `meta_state_ack`.","type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["id"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","additionalProperties":false}

name: mastra_meta_state_promote_rule
schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string","description":"Exact entry id to promote"},"rule_id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique rule identifier (e.g., rule-no-new-artifact-types)"},"enforcement":{"type":"string","enum":["gate","agent"],"description":"Where the rule is enforced (canonical: gate or agent)"},"pattern_type":{"type":"string","enum":["regex","glob","resolution-evidence-required","consult-checklist"],"description":"Pattern language (resolution-evidence-required is a consult gate, not a command-path match)"},"pattern":{"type":"string","description":"Pattern string (regex body, glob path, or session_id for resolution-evidence-required)"},"scope_predicate":{"default":"none","description":"Optional scope filter: 'none' (default, fires globally) or 'project_has_learning_loop_mcp' (only fires in projects with their own MCP server)","type":"string","enum":["none","project_has_learning_loop_mcp"]},"preview":{"default":false,"description":"If true, return sample matches without activating the rule","type":"boolean"},"sample_commands":{"description":"Sample commands to test against (for regex preview)","type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"sample_paths":{"description":"Sample paths to test against (for glob preview)","type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["id","rule_id","enforcement","pattern_type","pattern"],"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","additionalProperties":false}

name: mastra_meta_state_sweep
schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"apply":{"default":false,"description":"If true, commit the transitions. Default false (dry-run).","type":"boolean"}},"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","additionalProperties":false}

name: mastra_meta_state_archive
schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"candidates":{"default":[],"description":"Optional explicit list of entry ids to evaluate against the decision rule. If empty, the rule is applied to the entire registry.","type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"override":{"default":[],"description":"Operator override: force-archive these specific ids regardless of the decision rule.","type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"reason":{"description":"Default reason for archives triggered by the decision rule (used in archived_reason). Override ids use their own per-id reason.","type":"string"},"confirm":{"description":"Confirm a multi-id override archive after reviewing the preview. Required when override has more than one id.","type":"boolean"}},"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","additionalProperties":false}
